view.title: Validate persona scenario #3

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the persona scenario related to the digest mode, but the evidence provided does not confirm the necessary event types or payload configurations that are critical for this validation. Prior steps indicate gaps in evidence for key requirements such as event types and custom payload configurations, which are essential for determining the outcome of the scenario. Without this foundational evidence, it is impossible to assess whether the expected results can be achieved, leading to a blocked status.
